Posts

  • Nov 29, 2023

    Telegram UI Competition for Android

    Telegram is hosting a competition for Android developers to implement a new animation for deleting messages.

  • Oct 18, 2023

    Serverless Telegram Bot With Database Channel

    In this video I teach you how to create a telegram bot without programming and buying servers. We just use a cloudflare worker to answer users based on contents of a database channel.

  • Oct 14, 2023

    Telegram App Icon Competition

    Telegram is hosting a competition for artists to draw new icons for Telegram’s Android and iOS apps. The best icons may be later offered to users in addition to the default sets currently presented in both apps.

  • Oct 6, 2023

    ML Competition 2023

    🏆 Telegram ML Competition

  • Oct 3, 2023

    Best way to insert many images in excel

    If you’ve ever tried to insert multiple images in an excel file you know that excel’s default method isn’t very practical. Instead I present my vba method so you’ll be able to add as many files as you want.
